title: MDIY coming in to runner-up spot, GOTO tops net foreign
body: PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) displaced PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) from the top of net foreign transactions at today’s (19/12) closing bell.

title: HATM to carry out rights issue of 1.8 billion shares
body: PT Habco Trans Maritima Tbk (HATM) to carry out a rights issue of 1.8 billion shares with a nominal value of IDR 50 per share. The total shares to be issued are 25.71% of the 7 billion shares issued and paid up by this issuer.

title: Govt to collaborate with IPP to reach renewable energy mix target
body: The Indonesian government together with PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara (Persero) or PLN, are trying to achieve the new realization of New Renewable Energy (EBT) which is targeted at 17.87%.

title: Four blue-chip stocks decline, IHSG weakens
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) dropped 0.74% due to the weakening of several large-cap stocks on Thursday afternoon (19/12).

title: Retail company MDIY reveals business prospects post-IPO
body: PT Daya Intiguna Yasa Tbk (MDIY), the issuer behind the MR. D.I.Y retail brand, is ready to seize the opportunities in the non-grocery retail segment, which remains substantial, after its listing on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) today (19/12).

title: MDIY coming in to runner-up spot, GOTO tops net foreign
body: PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) displaced PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) from the top of net foreign transactions at today’s (19/12) closing bell.

title: HATM to carry out rights issue of 1.8 billion shares
body: PT Habco Trans Maritima Tbk (HATM) to carry out a rights issue of 1.8 billion shares with a nominal value of IDR 50 per share. The total shares to be issued are 25.71% of the 7 billion shares issued and paid up by this issuer.

title: Govt to collaborate with IPP to reach renewable energy mix target
body: The Indonesian government together with PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara (Persero) or PLN, are trying to achieve the new realization of New Renewable Energy (EBT) which is targeted at 17.87%.

title: Four blue-chip stocks decline, IHSG weakens
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) dropped 0.74% due to the weakening of several large-cap stocks on Thursday afternoon (19/12).

title: Retail company MDIY reveals business prospects post-IPO
body: PT Daya Intiguna Yasa Tbk (MDIY), the issuer behind the MR. D.I.Y retail brand, is ready to seize the opportunities in the non-grocery retail segment, which remains substantial, after its listing on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) today (19/12).

title: Allocating 30% IPO proceeds for expansion, MDIY to boost performance
body: PT Daya Intiguna Yasa Tbk (MDIY) has officially made its debut on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) on December 19, 2024.

title: Renewable energy company Hero Global Investment to set up IPO of 1.3 billion shares
body: PT Hero Global Investment Tbk (HGII), a renewable energy company, will conduct an Initial Public Offering (IPO) by releasing 1.3 billion shares.

title: Banks to receive liquidity support of IDR 290 trillion in 2025
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) will increase the portion of the Macroprudential Liquidity Incentive Policy (KLM) assistance to IDR 290 trillion for hundreds of banks starting next year.

title: ENRG to initiate buyback, setting up budget of USD 12 million
body: PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), an oil and gas company owned by the Bakrie Group, plans to conduct a share buyback with a budget of USD 12 million.

title: Positive revenue trend, yet MDKA saw worsening loss
body: Despite PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA) achieving revenue growth of 42.5% year-on-year (yoy) up to September 2024, its losses have widened significantly.

title: JCI downtrend continues, -0.7% this afternoon
body: The Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) continued its downward trend, dropping by 0.7% or 49.86 points to close at 7,107.88 today, extending the decline that has persisted for the past four trading sessions.

title: Foreign transactions drop; net sell closed at -387.64 million shares
body: On Wednesday, December 18, foreign transactions displayed a decreasing trend, with 2.13 billion shares bought and 2.90 billion shares sold. As a result, net foreign volume closed at -387.64 million shares.

title: BIPI remains steady at Top Net Foreign
body: PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) recorded net foreign of 129.48 million shares until today’s (18/12) closing.

title: BMF to raise stakes in ENAK to 50.10%
body: Barokah Melayu Food Pte Ltd (BMF) will boost its portion to 50.10% in PT Champ Resto Indonesia Tbk (ENAK) from 42.46% through a voluntary tender starting from Thursday (19/12) until January 17, 2025.

title: Bank Indonesia to maintain BI-rate at 6%
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) maintains BI-rate at 6%, deposit facility rate at 5.25%, and lending facility at 6.75%. The decision was recently made following BI Board of Governor Meeting held for two days, December 17 to 18.

title: PTBA prepares humic acid pilot project
body: PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA) is preparing the pilot project to transform low-calorie coals into humic acid after launching a humic acid prototype at IUP Peranap, Riau, last week (12/12).

title: Bayan Resources secures US$125 million loan facility from Bank Mega
body: Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN) succeeded in obtaining a loan facility worth US$ 125 million from PT Bank Mega Tbk (MEGA). The loan agreement was signed on December 13, 2024.

title: First session, GOTO recorded highest share volume
body: The trading volume of PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares reached 980 million shares before the closing of transactions on Wednesday afternoon (18/12).

title: Boy Thohir increases stake in Provident Investasi Bersama (PALM) by 373 million shares
body: Boy Thohir made a further investment of 373.75 million shares in PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM) on Monday, December 16. The investor’s share portion grew from 17.5% to nearly 20%.

title: PGEO targets Seulawah Agam drilling to begin in 2025
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Tbk (PGEO) and PT Pembangunan Aceh (Pema) are targeting the geothermal drilling in Work Area of Seulawah Agam, Aceh Besar, to kick off in 2025.

title: Leasing vessel, CBRE potentially scores IDR 264.62 billion
body: PT Cakra Buana Resources Energi Tbk (CBRE) will lease a unit of Bulk Carrier Supramax of 57,000 DWT to PT Sys Petrolindo Utama (SPU) with potential revenue of IDR 264.62 billion within the next 5 years.

title: JCI under pressure; foreign outflow detected in past 4 days
body: Foreign investors registered outflow for 4 consecutive days following steady corrections in Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI).

title: Sido Muncul to ready capex of IDR 175 billion in 2025
body: PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO) will allocate capital expenditure of approximately IDR 150-175 billion next year.

title: JCI saw corrections for 4 consecutive days to 7,157.73
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was closed 1.39% or 100.9 points lower, arriving at 7,157.73.

title: Foreign sell hit 5 billion shares, net foreign volume closed at -991 million shares
body: Foreign transactions on Tuesday, December 17, recorded a foreign sell volume of 5.10 billion shares, while the foreign buy volume was only around 4.11 billion shares.

title: GOTO out, BIPI reigns net foreign leaderboard
body: PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) was seen climbing to the top spot at net foreign list as of today’s (17/12) closing bell.

title: Down 7.72% in one week, ADRO promises dividend of USD 200 million
body: PT Alamtri Resources Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) announces interim dividend distribution of USD 200 million after the significant drop in its price within one week.

title: Eyeing growth, DPUM to boost exports
body: PT Dua Putra Utama Makmur Tbk (DPUM) will expand its export market reach to three countries in order to increase 2025 revenue.

title: J Resources sets 40% profit growth this year
body: PT J Resources Asia Pasifik Tbk (PSAB) is confident that its performance, both operational and financial, will arrive positively this year, even improving from last year.

title: Pemberton Asian Opportunities owns 6.29% stake in PZZA
body: Pemberton Asian Opportunities Fund (PAOF) is known to have increased its share portion by 1.33% to 6.29% from the previous 4.96% in PT Sarimelati Kencana Tbk (PZZA), the manager of Pizza Hut outlets, in a transaction last week (12/12 ).

title: BSDE sets tender offer price for SMDM shares at IDR 531
body: PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk (BSDE) made a tender offer for 382.01 million shares or the equivalent of 8.01% of the paid up and issued capital of PT Suryamas Dutamakmur Tbk (SMDM) 4.77 billion.

title: January-November 2024, trade balance surplus declines 14.12%
body: The Central Statistics Agency (BPS) recorded that the trade balance surplus fell 14.12% to US$28.85 billion during January-November 2024 compared to the same period in 2023 of US$33.60 billion.

title: BP2S SG/BNP Paribas claims nearly 60% of CMNP after acquiring 400 million shares
body: On Friday, December 13, 400 million shares of PT Citra Marga Nusaphala Persada Tbk (CMNP), an infrastructure development company, were acquired by BP2S SG/BNP Paribas Singapore Branch Wealth Management.

title: Triputra Agro Persada (TAPG) welcomed two new key investors
body: PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG) welcomed two significant new investors on Thursday, December 12. PT Daya Adicipta Mustika became the first after purchasing 1.17 billion shares of TAPG, or about 6% of the palm oil and rubber company.

title: Stock split greenlit, PTRO saw decline in price this morning
body: PT Petrosea Tbk’s (PTRO) price was corrected this morning after securing approval from shareholders regarding stock split plan with 1:10 ratio yesterday (16/12).
